free_text: Scattering and pick-up reactions with deuterons on Be,
B, C, N and O at 11.8 MeV
DE/DX silicon surface-barrier counter of
50 mu-m thickness
Relative error
CNPD: corrected 4-dig. year and lower cases
SD: Corrections in all Subents. BIB updated
The accuracy of data presentation  has been revised.
ERR-ANALYS moved to Subents 002-016.
ANG-ERR -> ANG-ERR-D; DATA-ERR3 -> ERR-DIG.
DATA-ERR -> ERR-1; DATA-ERR1 -> DATA-ERR.
No information
Fig.1 from Nucl.Phys.,A101(1967)449
SD: SF9=EXP deleted from REACTION code.
STATUS updated. ANG-ERR->ANG-ERR-D; DATA-ERR3->ERR-DIG.
The 10B target has been made by evaporation gun from
boron powder enriched to 96.5% in 10B. The total target
thickness was 250 mu-g/cm**2 (150 mu-g/cm**2 boron, the
other components being carbon, oxygen and a small
amount of nitrogen).
Error in the absolute cross sections for the
reactions 10B and 11B. The major source of error being
the target thickness.
Fig.1 from Nucl.Phys.,A101(1967)449
SD: SF9=EXP deleted from REACTION code.
STATUS updated. ANG-ERR->ANG-ERR-D; DATA-ERR3->ERR-DIG.
The thickness of 11B was 20 mu-g/cm**2.

the target thickness.
